name: Impeccable Credit Services
description_short: Houston credit repair firm disputing inaccurate, unverifiable, and incomplete items from all three credit bureaus. Ranked Best in Houston by Expertise.com 3 years running.
description_long:
Impeccable Credit Services is a Houston-based credit repair company with approximately 18 years in business, founded around 2007–2008. Operating under the motto "Repairing Credit. Changing Lives," the firm maintains two physical office locations in the Houston metropolitan area and claims to serve clients both domestically and internationally. No CDFI, HUD, NFCC, or other formal third-party certifications were identified during research, and BBB accreditation status could not be confirmed.

The company's core offering is disputing inaccurate, unverifiable, and incomplete negative items from clients' credit reports with the goal of improving scores enough to qualify for mortgages, auto loans, and better interest rates. Their service covers a wide range of derogatory items: bankruptcies, charge-offs, collections, foreclosures, judgments, late payments, repossessions, student loans, and tax liens. Clients receive access to an online portal to monitor their progress, with results typically expected within 45 days. A free credit consultation is offered as the entry point. Notably, the company also serves corporate (B2B) clients, an uncommon offering in the largely consumer-focused credit repair industry.

Impeccable Credit Services has been ranked the Best Credit Repair company in Houston by Expertise.com for three consecutive years, chosen from a field of over 1,500 area companies — a meaningful independent endorsement. Their Google rating of 4.8 out of 5 from 148 reviews reinforces a consistent pattern of client satisfaction. The presence of two brick-and-mortar Houston offices also sets them apart from the majority of credit repair competitors that operate exclusively online, offering a tangible in-person option for local clients who want face-to-face guidance.

For consumers researching this company, the most significant practical limitation is the complete absence of published pricing. Monthly fees, setup costs, and any guarantee details are only disclosed after a consultation call, which makes direct comparison shopping difficult. BBB rating and formal certification status remain unverified. The client login page on their website contains several typos — a minor but noticeable professionalism flag for a business-services firm. That said, for Houston-area consumers with complex or multi-item credit file problems who value an established local provider with demonstrable awards and strong reviews, Impeccable Credit Services is one of the more credible options in the regional market.
pros: Ranked Best Credit Repair company in Houston by Expertise.com for 3 consecutive years out of 1,500+ competitors
Strong Google rating of 4.8/5 from 148 verified reviews
Two physical office locations in Houston — rare for a credit repair firm, enabling face-to-face consultations
~18 years in business with demonstrated longevity in a high-turnover industry
Handles a broad range of derogatory item types: bankruptcies, foreclosures, tax liens, repossessions, judgments, and more
Online client portal for tracking dispute progress with results typically within 45 days
Serves corporate/B2B clients in addition to individual consumers — useful for business owners
cons: No pricing published anywhere on the website — fees and monthly costs only disclosed after a consultation call
No money-back guarantee or satisfaction guarantee details available
BBB rating and accreditation status unverified — not referenced on company website
No mobile app; client portal is web-only
Multiple typos on the client login page ('recieved,' 'regaurding,' 'Coorporate') — minor professionalism concern
best_for: Houston-area consumers who prefer working with a local credit repair firm in person
Individuals with multiple types of derogatory items (e.g., bankruptcy plus collections plus late payments) needing comprehensive dispute work
Business owners or corporate clients seeking credit repair services for their companies
Consumers preparing for a mortgage or auto loan who need measurable score improvement within a defined timeframe
diagnosis: Impeccable Credit Services is best suited for Houston-area consumers who want a seasoned, award-winning local credit repair firm with a strong review track record and the option for in-person service. The main caveat is full pricing opacity — prospective clients must go through a consultation before learning what they'll pay, and no guarantee terms are publicly disclosed, making it harder to evaluate value before committing.
services: Credit report dispute filing (inaccurate, unverifiable, and incomplete items)
Online client portal for progress tracking
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
